title: C: FMG and C: DG Compatibility
description: Adds the ability to use diesel and gasoline from either mod in either mods tech
body: A mod that works to add combat between Create: the factory must grow and Create diesel generators! This mod only currently works for the diesel and gasoline within both mods. This modpack was made for a small group of friends and is not made professionally. Bugs and issues could be present!
